name: jor1k
description: jor1k: OR1000 Javascript Emulator Running Linux
author: Sebastian Macke

scripts.build:js: browserify -r ./js/plugins/terminal-linux.js:LinuxTerm -r ./js/master/master.js:Jor1k -o demos/jor1k-master.bundle.js && esbuild demos/jor1k-master.bundle.js --minify --target=es2017 --outfile=demos/jor1k-master-min.js && browserify js/worker/worker.js -o demos/jor1k-worker.bundle.js && esbuild demos/jor1k-worker.bundle.js --minify --target=es2017 --outfile=demos/jor1k-worker-min.js && rm -f demos/jor1k-*.bundle.js
